channel.title: BirdBath on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in BirdBath on Nature Works

item.title: Stone Birdbath
item.description:
A heavy birdbath that can be easily cleaned is great for birds & can be made from natural materials

I was reading about birdbaths in the New York Times (warning: paywall). http://localhost:1313/blog/231014-stone-birdbath/
